title: Bridge Essay: Neurophysiological mechanisms of focused attention meditation: A scoping systema

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Neurophysiological mechanisms of focused attention meditation: Ascoping systematic review.** — Imaging neuroscience (Cambridge, Mass.) (2025). PMID: . DOI: 10.3389/fnhum.2021.628417. Score: 19. Focused attention meditation (FA) is afoundational and widely studied practice that cultivates sustained concentration by focusing on aspecific object, such as the breath, while disengaging from distractions. Numerous studies have investigated the neurophysiological mechanisms of FA, examining aspects such as spectral power, connectivity patterns, and neural entropy. However, despite this extensive research, clarity regarding the methodological approaches and key findings in this field remains
